name: みすずの国
short_description: Misuzu no Kuni is a kinetic visual novel with no choices or branching paths.Set in a late 20th-century Japan, it tells a traditional-style fantasy school drama.In this world, a special autonomous territory known as the Land of the Tengu exists within Japan.Supported language: Japanese only.
detailed_description:
Misuzu no Kuni is a linear visual novel with no branching choices.

The story is presented through visuals and sound, and progresses by clicking through the scenes.

Estimated playtime is around 2 to 3 hours.

A replay gallery feature is included, allowing players to revisit visuals and listen to the original soundtrack experienced in the game.

The story is set in an alternate version of late 20th century Japan, where an imaginary autonomous region called the “Land of the Tengu” exists.

There, a girl named Misuzu enters the country and joins the training of the Tengu, leading to a fantasy school drama.

Various fantasy elements appear throughout the story, including divine beast-like spirits called “Bake,” a Tengu princess, and magical powers known as “Jintsuuriki.”

The game is available in Japanese only.
